mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (full_name, furigana, nickname, email, region, age, gender, remark, is_deleted) VALUES (#{fullName}, #{furigana}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{region}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{remark}, COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, false))
INSERT INTO students_courses (student_id, course_name, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET full_name = #{fullName}, furigana = #{furigana}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, region = #{region}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, remark = #{remark}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
